Dlican DLI-2513
UV Flatbed

The Dlican DLI-2513 is a professional UV flatbed printer engineered for bright, detailed, and durable output on a wide range of rigid substrates including glass, wood, acrylic, and metal. Its eco-friendly UV curing technology minimises energy consumption and waste, while the linear motor drive system ensures smooth, high-precision carriage movement across the full print bed. Built for reliability and versatility in commercial signage and custom product applications.

Eco UVAuto HeightVacuum Table

Machine Components

  1. 1Linear Motor
  2. 2Static Suppression
  3. 3Auto Height Detection
  4. 4Emergency Switch
  5. 5Ink Tank
  6. 6Vacuum Switches
  7. 7Ink Level Display
  8. 8Anti-Collision System
  9. 9Vacuum Controller
  10. 10Monitor

Highlighting Points

  • In-built Media Auto Hide Sensor
  • In-built Display (common to all DLI models)
  • Y-axis Ball Screw System

Key Features

Eco-Friendly UV Technology

Reduces energy consumption and waste while maintaining top-quality vibrant print results on diverse substrates.

Versatile Substrate Support

Prints on glass, wood, acrylic, metal and many more flat rigid materials.

Linear Motor Drive

Smooth, precise carriage movement ensuring high accuracy across the full print bed.

Auto Height Detection

Automatically adjusts for varying substrate thicknesses to maintain optimal print distance.

Anti-Collision Protection

Built-in system prevents head crashes, protecting printheads and substrates from costly damage.

Vacuum Table System

Powerful vacuum holds flat materials firmly in place for consistent output quality.

Dlican DL 3200-RP
UV Flatbed

The Dlican DL 3200-RP is a high-performance UV flatbed printer delivering powerful, precise output on glass, wood, metal, and plastic substrates. Advanced UV curing technology produces vibrant, durable prints that cure instantly on contact, resulting in fully waterproof and scratch-resistant results. A heavy-duty welded steel frame eliminates vibration and ensures long-term mechanical precision for high-volume commercial production.

Instant UV CureMagnetic MotorSteel Frame

Machine Components

  1. 1Printing Platform
  2. 2Print Head
  3. 3Auto Correction System
  4. 4Rear Feeding System
  5. 5Magnetic Linear Motor
  6. 6Profile Locator
  7. 7Steel Frame
  8. 8Monitor
  9. 9Emergency Switch

Key Features

Magnetic Linear Motor

High-speed, precise carriage positioning with smooth, low-maintenance magnetic drive system.

Instant UV Cure

Prints cure immediately on contact ensuring fully cured, waterproof, and scratch-resistant output.

Automatic Correction System

Continuously monitors and corrects print alignment for consistent precision across the platform.

Rear Feeding System

Convenient loading and unloading from the rear for streamlined production workflows.

Profile Locator

Precisely positions printing jigs and substrates for accurate repeat-print alignment.

Steel Frame Construction

Heavy-duty welded steel base eliminates vibration and ensures long-term structural stability.

JHF V698
UV Flatbed

The JHF V698 is a wide-format UV roll printer delivering precise, high-quality output across wood, metal, glass, and plastics. Equipped with industrial-grade printheads and a powerful vacuum suction bed, it maintains sharp, consistent results across all supported substrates. The integrated ink supply cabinets with monitoring ensure uninterrupted production, while multi-roll media handling enables continuous high-volume runs without operator downtime.

JHF Vista SeriesMulti-RollVacuum Bed

Machine Components

  1. 1Print Head
  2. 2Ink Supply Cabinets
  3. 3Vacuum Suction Bed
  4. 4Media Unwind Rollers
  5. 5Media Tension Rollers
  6. 6Roller Control Display
  7. 7Emergency Stop Button
  8. 8Control Workstation

Key Features

High-Precision Print Head

Industrial-grade printheads deliver sharp detail and smooth gradients across all supported substrates.

Vacuum Suction Bed

Powerful vacuum system holds media flat during printing for sharp, consistent results.

Multi-Roll Media Handling

Supports multiple unwind rollers for continuous high-volume production without downtime.

Integrated Ink Supply

Built-in ink supply cabinets with level monitoring for uninterrupted, controlled ink delivery.

Roller Control Display

Dedicated display panel for precise tension and roller speed management.

Control Workstation

Integrated operator workstation for full machine management from a single interface.

JHF V398
Roll-to-Roll UV

The JHF V398 is a high-speed, 3.2-metre wide-format roll-to-roll UV printer setting a new benchmark in UV inkjet performance. Combining exceptional print quality for POP displays with the throughput required for large-scale indoor and outdoor billboard production, it is engineered for demanding commercial environments. The dual roll-to-roll system and bulk ink supply ensure seamless continuous operation across high-volume print runs.

3.2m WideHigh SpeedDual Roll

Machine Components

  1. 1Printhead
  2. 2UV Curing System
  3. 3Multi-Roll Feeding
  4. 4Bulk Ink Supply
  5. 5Media Sensor
  6. 6Roll Feed and Take-up
  7. 7Electrical Panel
  8. 8Monitor
  9. 9Linear Guide Rail

Key Features

3.2m Wide Format

Handles wide rolls up to 3.2 metres for large-format banners, billboards, and POP displays.

High-Speed UV Inkjet

Sets a new benchmark for UV inkjet throughput without compromising print quality.

Multi-Roll Feeding

Supports multiple roll feeds simultaneously for continuous batch production.

Bulk Ink Supply System

High-capacity ink supply reduces downtime and ensures consistent color delivery.

Media Management Sensor

Automatically detects media edges and manages tension for wrinkle-free output.

Dual Roll-to-Roll System

Integrated feed and take-up handles large media volumes smoothly and accurately.

JHF M5300
Hybrid UV 5m

The JHF M5300 is an ultra-wide hybrid UV printer combining rigid substrate and roll media capability in a single platform spanning up to 5 metres wide. Energy-efficient UV LED curing eliminates heat distortion and extends compatibility across a wide range of substrates. Its modular material loading and take-up adapter system accommodates diverse media types, making it ideal for large-format signage, exhibition graphics, and industrial decoration applications.

5m WideHybridUV LED

Machine Components

  1. 1Carriage and Printhead
  2. 2UV-LED Curing Lamps
  3. 3Media Drive Rollers
  4. 4Control Station
  5. 5Status Light Tower
  6. 6Loading Adapters
  7. 7Multi-Roll Feeding Kit
  8. 8Vacuum Table
  9. 9Media Take-Up System

Key Features

5m Hybrid Capability

Prints on both rigid sheets and flexible roll media up to 5 metres wide in a single machine.

UV-LED Curing System

Energy-efficient LED curing eliminates heat distortion, extending substrate compatibility.

Multi-Roll Feeding Kit

Enables simultaneous loading of multiple roll media for high-productivity runs.

Vacuum Table

Precision vacuum system secures rigid substrates firmly for consistent, high-quality output.

Status Light Tower

Visual indicators allow operators to monitor print progress from any floor location.

Material Loading Adapters

Modular loading and take-up core adapter system accommodates diverse media types.

JHF Venus 10R
Industrial 5m

The JHF Venus 10R sets a new benchmark in ultra-wide industrial printing, delivering intelligent, high-speed photo-realistic output at scale. Equipped with a double-row ten-colour output system and a 5-metre multi-roll design, it enables simultaneous printing of three 1.6-metre wide rolls. Fully automated unmanned operation, camera-guided double-sided printing, and an independently developed ink temperature control system ensure exceptional productivity and consistency.

5m Format10-ColorUnmannedUV LED

Machine Components

  1. 1UV Curing Lamps
  2. 2Take-up System
  3. 3Ink Cabinet
  4. 4Status Light Tower
  5. 5Print Head Carriage

Key Features

Superior Production Mode

Synchronises printing of three 1.6m wide rolls simultaneously for maximum throughput.

Ultra High Output Quality

5m wide, double-row ten-colour output with 0.5u high-precision metal encoder strip and maglev system.

Customised Feeding System

Customised feeding and roller structure makes materials run accurately and smoothly, reducing deviation.

Ink Temperature Control

Independently developed system greatly improves ink smoothness and printing stability.

Intelligent Module

Highly intelligent digital equipment with potential for further system upgrading, saving labour costs.

Double-Sided Intelligent Printing

Camera scanning finds printing positions accurately for precise double-sided output.

Radiation Protection

Front guardrail uses dark grey plexiglass shielding to prevent UV damage with one-key lifting.

JHF R9000 Pro
Industrial Ultra-Wide

The JHF R9000 Pro redefines ultra-wide industrial printing with unmatched speed, precision, and intelligent automation. Its dual-row, ten-colour output system and 5-metre multi-roll capability deliver photo-realistic results with optional colour, white, and varnish layer configurations. Highly efficient LED curing dries prints instantly, while the intelligent cutting function enables vertical image slicing synchronised with ongoing production.

5m Format20 HeadsDual RowUnmanned

Machine Components

  1. 1Print Head Carriage
  2. 2Media Feed System
  3. 3Start and Pause
  4. 4Ink Supply Cabinet
  5. 5Media Feed Roller

Key Features

Superior Production Mode

Synchronises printing of three 1.5m wide rolls simultaneously.

Ultra High Output Quality

20 heads with optional full-colour, colour-white-colour, and white-colour-varnish configurations.

Fully Automatic Drying System

Highly efficient LED curing prints and dries instantly with higher definition, brightness, and colour saturation.

Ink Temperature Control

Independently developed system improves ink smoothness and printing stability for consistent output.

Intelligent Module

Highly intelligent industrial equipment with significant potential for system upgrading.

Double-Sided Intelligent Printing

Camera scanning finds printing positions accurately for double-sided output.

Intelligent Cutting Function

Synchronises vertical image slicing into 2 to 3 parts while the machine continues working.

JHF Venus 33X
3.2m Hybrid UV

The JHF Venus 33X is an ultra-high-end 3.2-metre hybrid UV printer engineered for both roll and rigid sheet production. It can operate in single wide-roll mode at 3.2 metres or simultaneously print two rolls of different specifications up to 1.6 metres each. The German Honle mercury lamp curing system delivers efficient, energy-saving performance, while auto media edge detection and electronic height measurement ensure precise, repeatable output.

3.2m HybridHonle CuringDual Roll8-Layer

Machine Components

  1. 1Control Cabinet
  2. 2Linear Motor Guide Rail
  3. 3Carriage Assembly
  4. 4UV-LED Curing System
  5. 5Vacuum Bed
  6. 6Pinch Roller System
  7. 7Ink System and Bulk Tanks
  8. 8PLC Control Panel

Key Features

Flexible Production Mode

Prints a single 3.2m wide roll or simultaneously two rolls of different specifications within 1.6 metres.

Intelligent Rigid Sheet Feeding

Multiple rigid sheets printed simultaneously, achieving multi-purpose use with one machine.

German Honle Curing System

Adopts the German-made Honle mercury lamp. Efficient, energy saving, and noise-reducing.

Ink Constant Temperature Control

Stably controls temperature to ensure consistent ink properties in different environments.

Auto Media Edge Detection

Accurately detects boundaries of multiple material rolls with intelligent layout auto-optimisation.

Electronic Height Measurement

Automatically detects media thickness and switches printing mode accordingly.

Multi-Layer Printing

8 freely editable layers with independently adjustable image, ink volume, and parameters per layer.

JHF Venus 33X-S
Full-Auto Industrial

The JHF Venus 33X-S is a high-speed fully automated printer covering the complete production cycle from loading through printing to unloading. It prints up to four sheets simultaneously with a maximum single sheet size of 3200mm x 2000mm. Industrial-grade PLC control, multi-motor centering platform with blowing function, and a pallet lifting system rated to 2000kg combine to deliver exceptional throughput with minimal operator intervention.

Full Automation4-Sheet SimultaneousPLC Controlled2000kg Load

Machine Components

  1. 1Signal Tower
  2. 2Cooling and Suction Vents
  3. 3Inkjet System
  4. 4Central Process Module
  5. 5Print Module 1 (Left)
  6. 6Print Module 2 (Right)

Key Features

Flexible Production Mode

Prints four sheets simultaneously. Max single sheet: 3200mm (W) x 2000mm (L).

Automatic Alignment

Feeding system with left-right and front-back alignment for neat, consistent results.

Industrial-Grade PLC

Stably controls every aspect, ensuring precise equipment coordination and enhanced productivity.

Intelligent Safety Warning System

Voice and visual alarms with automatic reminders when the machine starts.

Intelligent Loading and Unloading

Fully automated via linear motors and servo motors with ball screws. Pallet lifting max 2000kg.

Multi-Motor Centering Platform

XY multi-motor control with blowing function to reduce friction.

Auto Height Detection

Automatically detects media thickness and switches printing modes accordingly.

Multi-Layer Printing

8 freely editable layers with independently adjustable parameters per layer.

JHF T3700
Textile and Fabric

The JHF T3700 addresses growing demand for automated, high-quality wide-format fabric printing. Designed specifically for soft signage and wall graphics across hotels, museums, retail outlets, and exhibition spaces, it delivers vibrant, personalised output with precision and efficiency. Textile-optimised feed and take-up systems ensure wrinkle-free output, while eco-friendly ink compatibility meets modern environmental standards in commercial print production.

Fabric / TextileSoft SignageWide Format

Machine Components

  1. 1Printhead Carriage
  2. 2Linear Rail
  3. 3Gantry and Carriage
  4. 4Ink Supply Controls
  5. 5Operator Interface
  6. 6Output Section
  7. 7Feed Roller
  8. 8Media Core Holders

Key Features

Textile-Optimised Design

Purpose-built for fabric and soft signage with specialised feed and take-up for wrinkle-free output.

Wide Format Capability

Handles wide-format fabric rolls for large soft signage, wall murals, banners, and lightbox applications.

Precision Feed System

Linear rail and gantry system ensure accurate carriage movement for consistent prints across full media width.

Eco-Friendly Inks

Supports sustainable textile inks for vibrant, lasting colour with reduced environmental impact.

Automated Media Handling

Feed roller and media core holder systems automate loading and take-up for continuous production.

Consistent Colour Output

Advanced ink supply and vacuum controls maintain stable ink delivery for uniform colour every run.
